title: erysimum sylvestre var. cheiranthus
intro: Erysimum sylvestre var. cheiranthus, also known as the woodland wallflower or cheiranthus, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and strong, pungent fragrance. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues and wounds. The health benefits of Erysimum sylvestre var. cheiranthus include its ability to relieve symptoms of coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to create medicinal remedies, such as cough syrups and topical creams.
